programmes.show_description: Arash Ghorbani-Zarin. Judge Rinder explores a shocking stabbing as a result of an 'honour killing'. Plus, the tragic story of a four-year-old who was a hit-and-run victim. S4, Ep7
Kelly Cochran. Kelly and Jason Cochran formed a killer husband and wife team - but then she turned on him. How many lives did she take before she was caught? S1, Ep9
Denise Williams. When Mike Williams left to go hunting one morning, he didn't know he was leaving forever. It would take nearly 20 years to find the killer: his wife, Denise. S1, Ep10
Night Caller. In 2015, 33-year-old Jonathan Cherol is shot dead in his garden. CCTV footage sends detectives on the hunt for a strange woman and a mysterious vehicle. S9, Ep9
The Man In The Cowboy Hat. In 2016, a motel cleaner finds the body of an unidentified woman in one of the rooms. Detectives use CCTV to track a mysterious suspect in a cowboy hat. S9, Ep10

Signed in Blood. Explores how handwriting analysts now play an important role in profiling criminals and verifying the authenticity of suicide notes. S1, Ep13

A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep16
FBI Files. A closer look at real FBI cases with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep18
Wesley Neailey/Katelyn Parker. An 11-year-old boy goes missing near his home in Newcastle. Plus, a vulnerable young woman puts her trust in the wrong man. S4, Ep8
Hell's Angel. When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance leaves a trail of death and devastation. S2, Ep9

Alice Ruggles. After Alice Ruggles ends their romantic relationship, her ex-boyfriend Harry Dhillon's refusal to let go turns sinister. S4, Ep6

A young couple go camping in Idaho, until their two-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators work tirelessly to find him, and the parents become suspects.
I Will Kill. Amber vanishes on Friday the 13th. A year later, Chelsea disappears. A survivor links the cases as police race to stop a hidden predator. S1, Ep2
Wesley Neailey/Katelyn Parker. An 11-year-old boy goes missing near his home in Newcastle. Plus, a vulnerable young woman puts her trust in the wrong man. S4, Ep8
Alexa Catches A Killer. In October 2022, 36-year-old Angie White is found dead at her home in Wales. Alexa recordings from the night of her murder help catch her killer. S1, Ep1
